file_insights.focus: Database query edge cases and error handling

patterns_discovered: Comprehensive edge case testing across multiple database entities
Using Drizzle ORM for query operations
Skipping tests if database is not configured
gotchas_discovered: Need to handle queries for non-existent IDs gracefully
Empty result sets should return empty arrays, not throw errors
Verify behavior when filtering with impossible conditions
Test update/delete operations on non-existent records
recommendations: Ensure all database query methods handle non-existent records gracefully
Maintain a consistent pattern of returning empty arrays for no-match scenarios
Continue expanding edge case tests for all database entities
Consider adding more complex filtering and impossible condition tests
